DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF VITALIY KOROLOV IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT VITALY KOROLOV IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION ON A DATE TO BE NOTICED BY PLAINTIFF AND TO BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2009. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO APPEAR WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT VITALY KOROLOV IN THE AMOUNT OF $937.50, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-24-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 502. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY, MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INCORPORATED AND MURPHY-MOORE REVOCABLE FAMILY TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF SECOND AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT - MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 BECAUSE THE STATUTORY DEFINITION OF WRONGFUL EVICTION IS BROAD ENOUGH TO INCLUDE CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION BY UNNECESSARILY PROLONGED REPAIR WORK. GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4 BECAUSE CHANGING LOCKS ON AN ALREADY UNINHABITABLE PROPERTY AT WHICH PLAINTIFF IS NO LONGER LIVING IS NOT WITHIN THE STATUTORY SCOPE. MR. FELLER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
YOSEF PERETZ, ESQ., (415)732-3777, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, RORY AUSTIN
ANN S. KAPLAN, ESQ., (510)548-7474, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY,

Plaintiff's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Vitaliy Korolov is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Vitaly Korolov is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff and to be completed no later than February 27, 2009. Defendant's failure to appear was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Vitaly Korolov in the amount of $937.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
